name: checkMediaLaw
description: Check if the given media content complies with media law regulations

content.description: The media content that needs to be checked for legal compliance

name: Astronomy API
description: Provides up-to-string astronomy information, including sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, moon phase, and illumination.

q.description: Query parameter based on which data is sent back. It could be a latitude and longitude (Decimal degree), city name, US zip, UK postcode, Canada postal code, metar code, iata code, or IP address.

dt.description: Optional string parameter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

name: Get Title Images
description: Retrieve photo shots of a movie title from the online movie database.

tconst.description: The ID of the movie title, in the format 'ttXXXXXXX' (e.g., 'tt0944947').

limit.description: The maximum number of images to return (up to 100).

name: Thai Lottery Draw Date Listing
description: Retrieve the string listing of Thai Lottery draw results.

name: find_nearby_cafes
description: Find nearby cafes based on user's location

latitude.description: The latitude of the user's location

longitude.description: The longitude of the user's location

radius.description: The maximum distance in meters from the user's location

name: All Belgian Races
description: Retrieve a list of all horse races in Belgium, including details such as race name, string, time, and location.

location.description: Filter races by location (e.g. Brussels, Antwerp, etc.)

name: Web Page Lookup
description: Retrieve information about a web page, including its Genius ID, annotations, and other relevant details.

raw_annotatable_url.description: The URL of the web page to look up

og_url.description: The URL as specified by an og:url meta tag in the page's head

canonical_url.description: The URL as specified by a canonical link tag in the page's head

text_format.description: The format for text bodies related to the document (defaults to html)

name: getAstrobiologyResearch
description: Retrieve research and information about astrobiology

topic.description: The specific topic related to astrobiology research (e.g., extremophiles, exoplanets, origin of life)

name: Top News Fetcher
description: Fetches a list of top news articles from the Sports domain

locale.description: The locale to use for the news articles

name: MathDifferential.calculateEquation
description: Solves a given differential equation using specified initial conditions and methods.

equation.description: The differential equation to be solved.

initialConditions.description: Initial conditions for solving the differential equation.

method.description: The numerical method to be used for solving the equation.

name: Keyword Search at Coordinate Point
description: Search for keywords at a specific coordinate point on a map and return search results without rank comparison data.

zoom.description: Google Maps zoom level. Allowed values: 0-18. Default: 13.

name: /titles/{id}/main_actors
description: Retrieves the main actors of a movie based on its IMDB ID.

id.description: IMDB ID of the title (e.g., tt0000002)

name: Get Litecoin Block Hash
description: Retrieve the hash of a Litecoin block, allowing you to get detailed information about the block.

block_number.description: The block number for which you want to retrieve the hash.

name: getAllInboxes
description: List inboxes in paginated form. The results are available on the `content` property of the returned object. This method allows for page index (zero based), page size (how many results to return), and a sort direction (based on createdAt time). You Can also filter by whether an inbox is favorited or use email address pattern. This method is the recommended way to query inboxes. The alternative `getInboxes` method returns a full list of inboxes but is limited to 100 results.

sort.description: Optional createdAt sort direction ASC or DESC

page.description: Optional page index in list pagination

before.description: Optional filter by created before given string time

since.description: Optional filter by created after given string time

size.description: Optional page size in list pagination

tag.description: Optionally filter by tags. Will return inboxes that include given tags

favourite.description: Optionally filter results for favourites only

search.description: Optionally filter by search words partial matching ID, tags, name, and email address

teamAccess.description: DEPRECATED. Optionally filter by team access.

name: createBrand
description: Create a new brand in the marketing platform

description.description: A brief description of the brand
